dragon_egg.title: Collect a Fire Dragon Egg from the dragon's cave lair

subtitle.text: They ruled the sky before you arrived. They will rule it after you're gone.

description: Ice & Fire dragons are the largest threats in this chapter.
They require the eye_black scroll before they can be damaged — boss locked.
Fire Dragons spawn in caves at various tiers.
Tier 3+ is required for meaningful drops.
Fire Dragon Scales → Dragonsteel Fire Ingots → armor.
Dragon Blood and Dragon Hearts have brewing uses.
The Fire Dragon cave also has a loot chest.
Dragon Eggs can be collected — they hatch into tameable dragons.
A tamed Tier 3+ dragon is one of the most powerful mounts.
Dragonsteel armor requires Fire Dragon Scales → Dragonsteel Ingots.
The crafting chain is long. The result is worth it.
→ Collect a Fire Dragon Egg from its lair [check]
